summary: Reconciled historical SpecBridge doctor warnings by adding missing closure evidence for issue-172 and issue-177, appending truthful historical reconciliation ledger entries for issue-172, issue-174, issue-177, and issue-178, updating stale current-goal memory, regenerating both dashboards, and recording post-merge closure for PR #204.
